```{r}
rf_balanced_real_real_auc <- calc_multiclass_auc(rf_balanced_real, dta_test_real_balanced, dta_test_real_balanced$valence)

# RF - Fake
rf_balanced_real_fake_mcc <- calc_mcc(rf_balanced_real_fake_perf)
rf_balanced_real_fake_auc <- calc_multiclass_auc(rf_balanced_real, dta_test_fake_balanced, dta_test_fake_balanced$valence)

# === ANALYSIS 2 BALANCED SUMMARY TABLE ===
analysis2_bal_summary <- data.frame(
  Model = "RF",
  Subset = c("Real", "Fake"),
  
  Accuracy = c(
    rf_balanced_real_real_perf$overall["Accuracy"],
    rf_balanced_real_fake_perf$overall["Accuracy"]
  ),
  
  P_value = c(
    rf_balanced_real_real_perf$overall["AccuracyPValue"],
    rf_balanced_real_fake_perf$overall["AccuracyPValue"]
  ),
  
  Kappa = c(
    rf_balanced_real_real_perf$overall["Kappa"],
    rf_balanced_real_fake_perf$overall["Kappa"]
  ),
  
  MCC = c(rf_balanced_real_real_mcc, rf_balanced_real_fake_mcc),
  
  AUC = c(rf_balanced_real_real_auc, rf_balanced_real_fake_auc),
  
  Sens_Pos = c(
    rf_balanced_real_real_perf$byClass["Class: positive", "Sensitivity"],
    rf_balanced_real_fake_perf$byClass["Class: positive", "Sensitivity"]
  ),
  
  Sens_Neu = c(
    rf_balanced_real_real_perf$byClass["Class: neutral", "Sensitivity"],
    rf_balanced_real_fake_perf$byClass["Class: neutral", "Sensitivity"]
  ),
  
  Sens_Neg = c(
    rf_balanced_real_real_perf$byClass["Class: negative", "Sensitivity"],
    rf_balanced_real_fake_perf$byClass["Class: negative", "Sensitivity"]
  ),
  
  Spec_Pos = c(
    rf_balanced_real_real_perf$byClass["Class: positive", "Specificity"],
    rf_balanced_real_fake_perf$byClass["Class: positive", "Specificity"]
  ),
  
  Spec_Neu = c(
    rf_balanced_real_real_perf$byClass["Class: neutral", "Specificity"],
    rf_balanced_real_fake_perf$byClass["Class: neutral", "Specificity"]
  ),
  
  Spec_Neg = c(
    rf_balanced_real_real_perf$byClass["Class: negative", "Specificity"],
    rf_balanced_real_fake_perf$byClass["Class: negative", "Specificity"]
  )
)

# Reshape to wide format
analysis2_bal_real <- analysis2_bal_summary[analysis2_bal_summary$Subset == "Real", -2]
analysis2_bal_fake <- analysis2_bal_summary[analysis2_bal_summary$Subset == "Fake", -2]

colnames(analysis2_bal_real)[-1] <- paste0("Real_", colnames(analysis2_bal_real)[-1])
colnames(analysis2_bal_fake)[-1] <- paste0("Fake_", colnames(analysis2_bal_fake)[-1])

analysis2_bal_wide <- merge(analysis2_bal_real, analysis2_bal_fake, by = "Model")

# Format for publication
analysis2_bal_pub <- analysis2_bal_wide %>%
  mutate(
    across(c(Real_Accuracy, Fake_Accuracy, Real_Kappa, Fake_Kappa, 
             Real_MCC, Fake_MCC, Real_AUC, Fake_AUC,
             Real_Sens_Pos, Real_Sens_Neu, Real_Sens_Neg,
             Fake_Sens_Pos, Fake_Sens_Neu, Fake_Sens_Neg,
             Real_Spec_Pos, Real_Spec_Neu, Real_Spec_Neg,
             Fake_Spec_Pos, Fake_Spec_Neu, Fake_Spec_Neg), 
           ~ sprintf("%.3f", .)),
    Real_P_value = format_pval(Real_P_value),
    Fake_P_value = format_pval(Fake_P_value)
  )

# Create publishable table
kable(analysis2_bal_pub,
      caption = "Table X. Analysis 2 (Balanced): Valence Classification Performance (Trained on Real Videos Only, Balanced)",
      col.names = c("Model", 
                    "Acc", "p", "κ", "MCC", "AUC", 
                    "Sens+", "Sens0", "Sens−", "Spec+", "Spec0", "Spec−",
                    "Acc", "p", "κ", "MCC", "AUC",
                    "Sens+", "Sens0", "Sens−", "Spec+", "Spec0", "Spec−"),
      align = c("l", rep("c", 22)),
      booktabs = TRUE) %>%
  kable_styling(latex_options = c("scale_down", "hold_position"),
                font_size = 9) %>%
  add_header_above(c(" " = 1, 
                     "Real Test Subset" = 11, 
                     "Fake Test Subset" = 11))
```

```{r}
# === VALENCE DEGRADATION ANALYSIS: KEY COMPARISON TABLE ===

library(knitr)
library(kableExtra)
library(pROC)

# Helper functions (include these earlier in your script)
calc_mcc <- function(cm) {
  conf_mat <- as.matrix(cm$table)
  n <- sum(conf_mat)
  c <- sum(diag(conf_mat))
  s <- n
  pk <- rowSums(conf_mat)
  tk <- colSums(conf_mat)
  cov_xy <- c * s - sum(pk * tk)
  cov_xx <- s^2 - sum(pk^2)
  cov_yy <- s^2 - sum(tk^2)
  if (cov_xx == 0 | cov_yy == 0) return(0)
  cov_xy / sqrt(cov_xx * cov_yy)
}

calc_multiclass_auc <- function(model, newdata, reference) {
  probs <- predict(model, newdata = newdata, type = "prob")
  auc_values <- sapply(levels(reference), function(class) {
    binary_ref <- ifelse(reference == class, 1, 0)
    if (length(unique(binary_ref)) < 2) return(NA)
    roc_obj <- pROC::roc(binary_ref, probs[[class]], quiet = TRUE)
    pROC::auc(roc_obj)
  })
  mean(auc_values, na.rm = TRUE)
}

format_pval <- function(p) {
  ifelse(p < 0.001, "<.001", sprintf("%.3f", p))
}

# Calculate metrics for Analysis 2 Balanced (Real-Only Training)
rf_bal_real_mcc <- calc_mcc(rf_balanced_real_real_perf)
rf_bal_real_auc <- calc_multiclass_auc(rf_balanced_real, dta_test_real_balanced, dta_test_real_balanced$valence)
rf_bal_fake_mcc <- calc_mcc(rf_balanced_real_fake_perf)
rf_bal_fake_auc <- calc_multiclass_auc(rf_balanced_real, dta_test_fake_balanced, dta_test_fake_balanced$valence)

# Build the comparison table
valence_table <- data.frame(
  Training = c("Real Only", "Real Only", ""),
  Test_Subset = c("Real", "Fake", "Δ (Real−Fake)"),
  
  Accuracy = c(
    rf_balanced_real_real_perf$overall["Accuracy"],
    rf_balanced_real_fake_perf$overall["Accuracy"],
    rf_balanced_real_real_perf$overall["Accuracy"] - rf_balanced_real_fake_perf$overall["Accuracy"]
  ),
  
  P_value = c(
    rf_balanced_real_real_perf$overall["AccuracyPValue"],
    rf_balanced_real_fake_perf$overall["AccuracyPValue"],
    NA
  ),
  
  Kappa = c(
    rf_balanced_real_real_perf$overall["Kappa"],
    rf_balanced_real_fake_perf$overall["Kappa"],
    rf_balanced_real_real_perf$overall["Kappa"] - rf_balanced_real_fake_perf$overall["Kappa"]
  ),
  
  MCC = c(
    rf_bal_real_mcc,
    rf_bal_fake_mcc,
    rf_bal_real_mcc - rf_bal_fake_mcc
  ),
  
  AUC = c(
    rf_bal_real_auc,
    rf_bal_fake_auc,
    rf_bal_real_auc - rf_bal_fake_auc
  ),
  
  Sens_Positive = c(
    rf_balanced_real_real_perf$byClass["Class: positive", "Sensitivity"],
    rf_balanced_real_fake_perf$byClass["Class: positive", "Sensitivity"],
    rf_balanced_real_real_perf$byClass["Class: positive", "Sensitivity"] - 
      rf_balanced_real_fake_perf$byClass["Class: positive", "Sensitivity"]
  ),
  
  Sens_Neutral = c(
    rf_balanced_real_real_perf$byClass["Class: neutral", "Sensitivity"],
    rf_balanced_real_fake_perf$byClass["Class: neutral", "Sensitivity"],
    rf_balanced_real_real_perf$byClass["Class: neutral", "Sensitivity"] - 
      rf_balanced_real_fake_perf$byClass["Class: neutral", "Sensitivity"]
  ),
  
  Sens_Negative = c(
    rf_balanced_real_real_perf$byClass["Class: negative", "Sensitivity"],
    rf_balanced_real_fake_perf$byClass["Class: negative", "Sensitivity"],
    rf_balanced_real_real_perf$byClass["Class: negative", "Sensitivity"] - 
      rf_balanced_real_fake_perf$byClass["Class: negative", "Sensitivity"]
  )
)

# Format for publication
valence_table_pub <- valence_table %>%
  mutate(
    across(c(Accuracy, Kappa, MCC, AUC, Sens_Positive, Sens_Neutral, Sens_Negative),
           ~ ifelse(is.na(.), "—", sprintf("%.3f", .))),
    P_value = ifelse(is.na(P_value), "—", format_pval(P_value))
  )

# Create publishable table
kable(valence_table_pub,
      caption = "Table 3. Valence Classification Performance on Real vs. Fake Test Subsets (RF model trained on real videos only, balanced classes).",
      col.names = c("Training", "Test Subset", "Acc", "p", "κ", "MCC", "AUC", 
                    "Sens+", "Sens⁰", "Sens−"),
      align = c("l", "l", rep("c", 8)),
      booktabs = TRUE) %>%
  kable_styling(latex_options = c("hold_position"),
                font_size = 10) %>%
  row_spec(3, italic = TRUE) %>%
  footnote(general = "Sens+ = Sensitivity for positive valence (happy, laughing); Sens⁰ = neutral; Sens− = negative (angry, disgusted). Δ row shows the performance difference between real and fake test subsets.",
           general_title = "Note: ",
           footnote_as_chunk = TRUE)
```

DeLong CIs:

```{r}
library(pROC)

# Function to calculate multiclass AUC with CI (DeLong method)
calc_multiclass_auc_ci <- function(model, newdata, reference, ci_level = 0.95) {
  # Get class probabilities
  probs <- predict(model, newdata = newdata, type = "prob")
  
  # Calculate AUC and CI for each class (one-vs-rest)
  auc_results <- lapply(levels(reference), function(class) {
    binary_ref <- ifelse(reference == class, 1, 0)
    if (length(unique(binary_ref)) < 2) {
      return(list(auc = NA, ci_lower = NA, ci_upper = NA))
    }
    roc_obj <- pROC::roc(binary_ref, probs[[class]], quiet = TRUE)
    ci_obj <- pROC::ci.auc(roc_obj, conf.level = ci_level, method = "delong")
    
    list(
      auc = as.numeric(pROC::auc(roc_obj)),
      ci_lower = ci_obj[1],
      ci_upper = ci_obj[3]
    )
  })
  
  names(auc_results) <- levels(reference)
  
  # Calculate macro-averaged AUC
  aucs <- sapply(auc_results, function(x) x$auc)
  ci_lowers <- sapply(auc_results, function(x) x$ci_lower)
  ci_uppers <- sapply(auc_results, function(x) x$ci_upper)
  
  macro_auc <- mean(aucs, na.rm = TRUE)
  # Conservative approach: average the CIs
  macro_ci_lower <- mean(ci_lowers, na.rm = TRUE)
  macro_ci_upper <- mean(ci_uppers, na.rm = TRUE)
  
  list(
    per_class = auc_results,
    macro_auc = macro_auc,
    macro_ci_lower = macro_ci_lower,
    macro_ci_upper = macro_ci_upper
  )
}

# Calculate for Real test subset
auc_ci_real <- calc_multiclass_auc_ci(
  rf_balanced_real, 
  dta_test_real_balanced, 
  dta_test_real_balanced$valence
)

# Calculate for Fake test subset
auc_ci_fake <- calc_multiclass_auc_ci(
  rf_balanced_real, 
  dta_test_fake_balanced, 
  dta_test_fake_balanced$valence
)

# Print results
cat("=== Real Test Subset ===\n")
cat(sprintf("Macro AUC: %.3f [%.3f-%.3f]\n", 
            auc_ci_real$macro_auc, 
            auc_ci_real$macro_ci_lower, 
            auc_ci_real$macro_ci_upper))

cat("\n=== Fake Test Subset ===\n")
cat(sprintf("Macro AUC: %.3f [%.3f-%.3f]\n", 
            auc_ci_fake$macro_auc, 
            auc_ci_fake$macro_ci_lower, 
            auc_ci_fake$macro_ci_upper))

# Per-class breakdown (if needed)
cat("\n=== Per-Class AUCs (Real) ===\n")
for (class in names(auc_ci_real$per_class)) {
  res <- auc_ci_real$per_class[[class]]
  cat(sprintf("%s: %.3f [%.3f-%.3f]\n", class, res$auc, res$ci_lower, res$ci_upper))
}
```
